name: The Unlife of Gorlak
short_description: Play as a Gorlak, a recently resurrected dragon in this raising sim JRPG adventure! Featuring deep combat and multiple endings. Become the dragon you want to be!
detailed_description:
The Unlife of Gorlak is an RPG Where you play as a dragon who died but got better (or is at least trying to). You have been resurrected as a skeletal dragon by a necromancer. As you returned to the living world you felt the presence of the hero who had slain you has given chase. You have one month to prepare for his arrival so you can tell him how you really feel about him!

featuring...

  • multiple Endings!
  • 10 Skills that allow you to gain new combat abilities and surmount various encounters.
  • Use Sleights and Taunts to get an extra move in without spending a turn in combat.
  • Uncover pieces of your past in a journey of self discovery.
